pages.text: The $(item)Badlands Skyseed$() — red sand and terracotta. Red sand comes from a $(bold)Desert seed thrown over a badlands$(); bake clay into terracotta.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A mesa isle. Red sand over a striped body of $(item)terracotta$() — orange, yellow, white, gray, red, and brown bands cross its cliffs.
$(bold)Looks$()$(br)Mesa (red sand), eroded (terracotta top), and wooded (a green, dark-oak-topped plateau) variants.
$(bold)Gold$()$(br)Badlands run rich with $(item)gold$(), as in the vanilla mesa, with a little redstone besides.
